mapper.update: UPDATE branches SET name = #{name}, branch_type = #{branchType}, status = #{status}, source_branch_name = #{sourceBranchName}, latest_commit_sha = #{latestCommitSha}, metadata = #{metadata}::jsonb, is_protected = #{isProtected}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM branches WHERE repository_id = #{repositoryId} ORDER BY CASE branch_type WHEN 'MAIN' THEN 1 WHEN 'DEVELOP' THEN 2 WHEN 'RELEASE' THEN 3 WHEN 'HOTFIX' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, name
SELECT * FROM branches WHERE repository_id = #{repositoryId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY name
SELECT * FROM branches WHERE repository_id = #{repositoryId} AND branch_type = #{branchType} ORDER BY name
SELECT * FROM branches WHERE repository_id = #{repositoryId} AND name = #{name}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM branches WHERE id = #{id}
